lines: Umwana yavukiye  Mu murwa wa Dawidi Ni we Yes' Uwiteka Yadusezeranije.
Duhimbaz' uwo munsi Yesu yatuvukiye; Tubyamamaze hose Yuko haj’ umukiza
Habayehw’abungeri,    Babona marayika, Baratinya; na w’ ati : Noneho, mutinyuke!
Ati : Krist’ Umukiza Yaje mu gihugu cye; Umuremyi wa byose Yavukiye mw’
Mwana wera, w'lmana, Turagupfukamiye, Tugushimira cyane Yuk’ utujemo, Yesu !
